violations.text: The floors throughout the back storage area has an accumulation of debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/06/2025

Light shields in produce open case cooler area was not in good repair and/or improper adjustment(observed light shield metal plates missing screws and loose) . Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the open case coolers, chest coolers, and chest freezers have an accumulation of food residue and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The outside dumpster area inside and outside of enclosure have an accumulation of food debris, foliage, litter, and/or other debris. Refuse areas shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023

The floors in back storage area and walk in coolers have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/14/2023
